targets.query: SELECT last("latency_ms") FROM "smokeping" WHERE "target" = 'Router' AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("latency_ms") FROM "smokeping" WHERE "target" = 'Cloudflare' AND "category" = 'DNS' AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("latency_ms") FROM "smokeping" WHERE "target" = 'Google' AND "category" = 'DNS' AND $timeFilter
SELECT last("download_mbps") FROM "speedtest" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("upload_mbps") FROM "speedtest" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT mean("loss_percent") FROM "smokeping" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time(1h)
SELECT mean("latency_ms") FROM "smokeping" WHERE "category" = 'LocalNetwork' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "target" fill(null)
SELECT mean("latency_ms") FROM "smokeping" WHERE "category" = 'DNS' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "target" fill(null)
SELECT mean("latency_ms") FROM "smokeping" WHERE "category" = 'Internet' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "target" fill(null)
SELECT mean("loss_percent") FROM "smokeping" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "target" fill(null)
SELECT "download_mbps" FROM "speedtest" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT "upload_mbps" FROM "speedtest" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT "ping_ms" FROM "speedtest" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT "jitter_ms" FROM "speedtest" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT "download_mbps", "upload_mbps", "ping_ms", "server_name" FROM "speedtest" WHERE $timeFilter ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT last("most_congested_score") FROM "wifi_summary" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("most_congested_channel") FROM "wifi_summary" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("total_networks") FROM "wifi_summary" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("networks_24ghz") FROM "wifi_summary" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("networks_5ghz") FROM "wifi_summary" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT last("least_congested_channel") FROM "wifi_summary" WHERE $timeFilter
SELECT mean("interference_score") FROM "wifi_channel" WHERE "band" = '2.4GHz' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "channel" fill(null)
SELECT last("interference_score") FROM "wifi_channel" WHERE "band" = '2.4GHz' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY "channel"
SELECT mean("networks_24ghz") FROM "wifi_summary" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("networks_5ghz") FROM "wifi_summary" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT mean("max_signal_dbm") FROM "wifi_channel" WHERE "band" = '2.4GHz' AND $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "channel" fill(null)
